title: Brihadaranyaka 4.3: The Two States
description: From the Brihadaranyaka 4.3 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Brihadaranyaka 4.3 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: There are two states for that being — this world and the other world. There is a third state, the dream state, between them. In dream he is creator. There are no chariots, no roads, but he creates chariots and roads. There are no joys, but he creates joys. He is the maker of all.
